extension.summary: Netflix-style movies & TV via your own personal debrid service
extension.description: Sunday TV is a movie and TV show front-end for Kodi with a Netflix-inspired interface. It browses metadata and artwork from TMDB and streams titles through your own self-hosted personal debrid service, with no external debrid provider required. Features Continue Watching, My List, search, and quality selection. Ships with no preconfigured sources: you supply your own TMDB API key and point it at your own backend.
